title: Frame signature field parsed but not used in from_bytes path
description: In rust/lichen-link/src/frame.rs:324-327, the Signature field is set based on SIGNATURE_BIT, but the frame parser doesn't verify signatures itself - that's done in LinkLayer. The LichenFrame struct thus contains unverified signature presence. A caller who gets a LichenFrame from from_bytes might assume signature.is_present() means the signature verified. Document prominently that LichenFrame is a parsed-but-not-verified structure, or rename to UnverifiedLichenFrame.
close_reason: Fixed: Added prominent '# Security: Unverified Structure' documentation to LichenFrame struct explaining that signature.is_present() indicates wire presence not verification, and callers must use LinkLayer::verify().
